data.title: Founder Alex Mashinsky settled FTC case with $10M payment, tied to $4.72B judgment based on asset disclosures.
data.description: Mashinsky has been ordered by the FTC to pay $10 million, with the payment linked to a $4.72 billion judgment, which is mostly suspended for now. This judgment could be reinstated based on the disclosure of assets.

data.title: Canada plans to ban crypto ATMs to combat scams and money laundering. Regulators target high-risk parts of crypto sector.
data.description: The Canadian government has highlighted that Bitcoin ATMs are increasingly being exploited by scammers, prompting regulatory efforts to enhance supervision of the high-risk segments within the cryptocurrency industry. Ottawa identified these ATMs as a significant tool for illicit activities, emphasizing the need for improved oversight.

data.title: Delivering an Open Data Center Ecosystem for AI
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain on April 29, 2026, the Open Compute Project Foundation (OCP) is leading advancements in technology from chip design to grid management in data centers. This nonprofit organization focuses on bringing large-scale innovations and best practices to data centers globally. The OCP aims to revolutionize the industry by implementing cutting-edge solutions for both hyperscale and local data centers.

Reports: Sound of explosion heard related to destruction of explosives near Tabriz

data.title: SOLAI Limited Announces Changes to Board of Directors
data.description: Akron, Ohio - Today, SOLAI Limited (NYSE: SLAI), previously known as "BTCM", a leading personal AI and digital infrastructure provider, revealed that Mr. Bo Yu has stepped down from his role as Chairman of the Board.

data.title: Graphic Packaging Holding Company signs 250-megawatt solar agreement with NextEra Energy Resources to advance renewable energy in Texas
data.description: Graphic Packaging Holding Company, a leading global provider of sustainable consumer packaging, revealed a virtual power purchase agreement following the accomplishment of its solar energy projects in Spain. This North American deal marks a significant milestone for the company. The announcement was made on April 29, 2026, and comes after the successful installation of solar energy systems backed by the company in Spain. Graphic Packaging Holding Company, listed on NYSE as GPK, has been actively engaged in promoting sustainable practices and aims to further expand its renewable energy initiatives.

data.title: CGI reports second quarter Fiscal 2026 results
data.description: The company with stock market symbols GIB.A on TSX and GIB on NYSE, available at cgi.com/newsroom, recently reported a revenue increase of 3.3% and a diluted EPS accretion of 10.6% in Q2 of the fiscal year 2026. Key performance highlights show revenue reaching $4.16 billion, representing a 3.3% increase year-over-year or 1.6% when adjusted for constant currency fluctuations. Earnings before income taxes amounted to $617.7 million.

data.title: PROSPERITY BANCSHARES, INC.® REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2026 EARNINGS
data.description: On January 1, 2026, the merger of American Bank Holding Corporation was successfully finalized, followed by the completion of the merger of Southwest Bancshares, Inc. on February 1, 2026. In the first quarter of 2026, the company reported a net income of $116.3 million with diluted earnings per share amounting to $1.16. It is important to note that these figures exclude merger-related expenses totaling $42.5 million.

data.title: Entergy reports first quarter 2026 financial results
data.description: Entergy Corporation (NYSE: ETR) has confirmed its 2026 guidance and has revised its long-term projections. In the first quarter of 2026, the company reported earnings per share of 83 cents on an as-reported basis and 86 cents on an adjusted (non-GAAP) basis. The positive results indicate a promising start to the year for Entergy. The company is optimistic about its future performance and has raised its long-term outlooks based on the first quarter's performance.

data.title: Freed Launches Coding Assistant for Independent Practices
data.description: In San Francisco, Freed, an AI clinical documentation platform used by over 26,000 clinicians, unveiled Coding Assistant. This AI tool aids independent practices in accurately capturing reimbursements from patient encounters. By producing ICD-10 and CPT codes at the justified E/M level, it enhances documentation to minimize denial risks. Small practices face a coding crisis as most physicians receive no coding education during medical school.

data.title: Babcock & Wilcox Secures $21 Million for Fuel Switching Technology Awards; Parts and Services Continues Strong Performance Driven by Increased Baseload Demand
data.description: B&W, based in Akron, Ohio, has recently announced receiving over $21 million in awards for fuel switching technologies. This significant amount reflects a growing trend in the increased use of coal and gas power plants.

data.title: Delek Logistics Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Brentwood-based Delek Logistics Partners, LP (NYSE: DKL) shared its Q1 2026 financial outcomes, noting robust performance driven by efficient operations in crude, gas, and water sectors. President Avigal Soreq highlighted the success, revealing ongoing advantages from the expansion of Delaware crude and water gathering divisions. The specifics of the financial results were not provided in the available text.

data.title: Delek US Holdings Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DK) based in Brentwood, Tennessee, shared its first-quarter financial results for 2026. The company reported a solid start to the year, building on the progress made in the previous year. CEO Avigal Soreq expressed satisfaction with the performance, highlighting the positive impact of their Enterprise Optimization Plan and other strategic initiatives on cash flow. The quarter ended on March 31, 2026, marked by a push towards enhanced value creation.

data.title: Yimutian Inc. Announces Plan to Implement Change in American Depositary Shares (ADS) to Ordinary Share Ratio
data.description: Yimutian intends to modify its ADS conversion ratio from 1 ADS equaling 25 Class A ordinary shares to 375, with the change expected to take effect around May 18th at US Eastern time.

data.title: Agios reveals Q1 2026 financials & business update.
data.description: A recent report states that approximately 3,500 people attended the music festival last weekend. This marks a significant increase compared to last year, where only 2,000 people attended. The festival featured over 50 artists from various music genres and had a total of 10 stages for performances. Additionally, the event generated over $1.5 million in revenue, making it the most successful year for the festival yet. Organizers are already planning for next year's event and are expecting an even larger turnout.

data.title: Regeneron Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial and Operating Results
data.description: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc., headquartered in Tarrytown, New York, has released its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The company, listed on NASDAQ as REGN, shared updates on its business operations in a press release on April 29, 2026.

data.title: Quarterly Activities and Cashflow Report - March 2026
data.description: Progress is underway at the Estelle project, with significant advancements in gold exploration and antimony development. The US redomiciliation process is also ongoing. Key updates include a 25% increase in gold resources and a 15% rise in antimony resources. These developments mark a pivotal moment for the project, enhancing its potential for future success.

data.title: Costamare Inc. Reports Results For The First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: Costamare Inc. announced their unaudited financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The company, trading as CMRE on the NYSE, released this information from Monaco on April 29, 2026.
